extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won a technical sprint finish after breakaway rider Søren KRAGH ANDERSEN solo'd to within 300m before being caught
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step deployed dual sprint strategy with Alaphilippe turning for Cavendish after exhausting lead-out, revealing backup firepower.
Breakaway rider Søren Kragh Andersen nearly stole sprint stage by persisting solo inside final kilometer, delaying sprinter team commitment.
Morkov exhibited intermediate sprint energy management for Cavendish, securing 15 points at Vitré without burning Cavendish's matches.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Morkov's energy conservation tactics at intermediate sprint (36km to go) proved crucial for final sprint freshness
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Sacrificed sprint finish to lead out Cavendish in final 300m despite holding yellow jersey and green jersey contention
rider_signals.VAN MOER Brent: neutral: Won intermediate sprint at Vitré but couldn't sustain breakaway cooperation with Perhi through finale
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: positive: Solo attack with 6km remaining nearly succeeded, maintaining 15-second gap inside final kilometer before capture
